name: Gambino
description:
[Guts'](https://anilist.co/character/422/Guts) adoptive father, and leader of a mercenary band. Gambino trained Guts to be a mercenary like himself and even gave Guts his first scar (across his nose) during a practice fight. 

~!Gambino sold Guts one night to [Donovan](https://anilist.co/character/132490/Donovan), a fellow soldier, who raped young Guts and whom Guts later brutally kills afterwards. Gambino was later hit by a cannon blast in battle and lost his leg and the ability to fight. This infuriated his anger at Guts even further, as he also blamed the death of his lover, Shizu, on Guts when she adopted him. Gambino became drunk one night and tried to kill Guts in anger. He admits he sold Guts to Donovan for three silver coins right before Guts killed him in self-defence.!~
